query:
-- Check internet service addresses from CSV against DB
SELECT id, connectionId, serviceAddress, serviceType, status
FROM services
WHERE serviceAddress LIKE '%Maryborough%'
   OR serviceAddress LIKE '%Cleveland%'
   OR serviceAddress LIKE '%Kippa-Ring%'
   OR serviceAddress LIKE '%Brendale%'
   OR serviceAddress LIKE '%Coolum%'
   OR serviceAddress LIKE '%Sippy Downs%'
   OR serviceAddress LIKE '%Milton%'
   OR serviceAddress LIKE '%Torquay%'
   OR serviceAddress LIKE '%Tewantin%'
   OR serviceAddress LIKE '%Rockhampton%'
LIMIT 30;
